summary: Verified all 3 UI fixes for CarryOn estate planning app signup flow: (1) Address step yellow security note visible without scrolling at 390x844 viewport - PASS, (2) Relationship and Sex dropdowns visible on beneficiary enrollment step - PASS, (3) BeneficiariesPage edit modal has City/State/ZIP labels - PASS (code verified)

test_1_address_step_yellow_note.description: Address step (Step 3) shows yellow security note 'Your address is encrypted and stored securely...' fully visible without scrolling at 390x844 mobile viewport
test_1_address_step_yellow_note.verification_method: Playwright UI test with mobile viewport

test_2_beneficiary_dropdowns.description: Beneficiary enrollment step (Step 6) shows both Relationship and Sex dropdowns visible
test_2_beneficiary_dropdowns.code_changes_verified: SignupPage.js lines 736-764 add Relationship/Sex dropdowns in grid

test_3_beneficiaries_modal_labels.description: BeneficiariesPage edit modal address section has Label components for City, State, ZIP fields

critical_code_review_comments: All 3 requested UI fixes are properly implemented and verified
test_credentials: None required for signup flow testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 UI fixes verified: (1) Address step yellow note visible without scroll at mobile 390x844 viewport, (2) Relationship and Sex dropdowns present on beneficiary step after selecting Married in marital step, (3) City/State/ZIP labels added to BeneficiariesPage edit modal. Signup flow works: Name -> Personal (DOB) -> Address -> Role (Benefactor) -> Marital (Married) -> Spouse Beneficiary step with dropdowns.
